acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_F006] PASS only if the revised 61-81 span contains at least two non-dialogue sentences of Lena's interior processing and no run longer than six consecutive paragraphs in that span without interiority. FAIL if the exchange remains an uninterrupted external transcript.

[chapter_04_F007] PASS only if the exact phrase "nodded once" appears at most once in the revised chapter and all three cited beats communicate different intent through different physical actions. FAIL if the same gesture formula persists in 2+ places.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised 61-81 span contains at least two non-dialogue sentences of Lena's interior processing and no run longer than six consecutive paragraphs in that span without interiority. FAIL if the exchange remains an uninterrupted external transcript.
findings.problem: The chapter runs 11 consecutive paragraphs without focalized interior experience, creating screenplay-like transcript flow at the exact moment the forensics should alter Lena's internal stance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Within snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:61-81, insert 2-3 brief interior beats (sensation, inference, memory, or self-assessment) between dialogue turns while preserving procedural tempo.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the exact phrase "nodded once" appears at most once in the revised chapter and all three cited beats communicate different intent through different physical actions. FAIL if the same gesture formula persists in 2+ places.
findings.problem: Recurring construction tic: "[Name/Pronoun] nodded once" repeats three times, signaling autopilot rhythm and flattening gesture specificity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise gesture language at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:133, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:205, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:239 so each beat carries a distinct physical action tied to motive; keep the exact "nodded once" formula in no more than one location.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
